overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game showing a character in colonial-era clothing walking through a snowy 18th-century village and surrounding forest. The character passes wooden buildings, NPC villagers with a dog, and encounters British soldiers in red coats in the distance while traversing the winter landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village edge with colonial house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a white colonial house through snow-covered ground

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing near the house entrance

entered.detail: two-story white wooden house with multiple windows and a central door
low wooden picket fence running along the property line
tall leafless trees with snow on branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snowy landscape toward a white colonial house. A wooden fence lines the left side while bare trees frame the scene. Near the house, a group of NPC villagers stand together with a dog wandering nearby.

events.description: moving from the residential house area toward a darker wooden barn structure

agents.ego_description: continuing past the white house and turning toward a barn area

entered.detail: large dark brown wooden barn with sloped roof
snow-covered hedge rows lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the white house, which falls behind, and approaches a large dark wooden barn. Snow-covered hedges line the right side of the path as the scene transitions from the residential area toward more rural outbuildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest path with military patrol

events.description: flock of birds scatter from the snow-covered ground and fly away

agents.ego_description: walking through forest path observing red-coated soldiers in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of soldiers in red uniforms marching through the forest

entered.detail: large fallen tree lying across the snow
distinctive red-leaved shrubs in the snow

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dense snowy forest, passing a fallen log and red-leaved bushes. In the distance, a group of red-coated soldiers march through the trees. At around 38 seconds, a flock of birds suddenly scatters from the ground and flies away.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path toward distant buildings

entered.detail: white building visible through the trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the deep snow-covered forest, with tall trees creating a canopy overhead. A distant farmhouse becomes visible through the trees ahead as the path winds through snow-covered evergreens and red bushes fade into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet colonial residential area into a dense, snowy wilderness. It begins with the character walking past a wooden fence toward a white colonial house where villagers and a dog are gathered. As the character moves past the house, the scene shifts toward a more rural setting, passing snow-covered hedges and a large dark wooden barn. The path then leads directly into a thick forest of tall trees and red-leaved bushes, where a group of red-coated soldiers marches in the distance just as a flock of birds suddenly scatters from the ground. Finally, the camera winds through deep snow and evergreens, moving away from the brush toward a distant farmhouse visible through the woodland canopy.
